error_reason: column name mismatch and positional data mismatch
gt_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T3.TagName = 'r', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN tags AS T3 ON T3.ExcerptPostId = T2.PostId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Community'
pred_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.Tags LIKE '%<r>%' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id WHERE TRIM(u.DisplayName) = 'Community';
question: Based on posts posted by Community, calculate the percentage of posts that use the R language.
